codeReview.summary: The feature implementation in commit aeca546 meets the ER diagram requirements: page exists at /er/, Mermaid is added and used, entities/typed attributes and relationship cardinalities are rendered, empty/error states are handled, self-references are not filtered out, scaling support is present via a scrollable container, and navigation includes an ER Diagram entry.

issues.description: The page performs direct fetch logic instead of using a dedicated API helper function from web/src/lib/api.ts, which diverges from the documented frontend convention ('do NOT duplicate fetch logic'). This is a maintainability concern but does not block feature behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The astro-frontend skill currently requires agent-browser verification, but this feature run completed successfully without invoking agent-browser and still reported followedProcedure=true. The skill likely needs clearer guidance on when visual-browser verification is mandatory vs optional.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/astro-frontend/SKILL.md:22 and :48-56 require agent-browser; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 0cbaa842-6df6-486b-bde4-1e6bd162f751 shows no agent-browser tool invocation; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly requests this clarification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture knowledge is stale regarding ER diagram status.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:69 states 'ER diagram page remains pending', but commit aeca546 adds web/src/pages/er.astro and NavSidebar entry for /er/.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The API response shape used by the ER page (`GET /api/map/solution/domain` returning nested entities/relationships payloads) is not concretely documented in shared library docs, leading workers to inspect handler/store internals before implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows repeated exploration of parse_slot/read_directory and map store internals before concluding endpoint shape; .factory/library/architecture.md API section is high-level and does not document this payload format.

summary: Reviewed feature er-diagram-page for commit aeca546 and found requirements satisfied with no blocking defects. One non-blocking maintainability issue was noted (duplicated fetch logic), plus shared-state observations about skill guidance and stale/missing architecture knowledge.
